full_text:
Yin Feng (Cizeng) 尹奉 (次曾)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Feng (尹奉), styledCizeng (次曾), was born in Hanyang. A man of respected family, he played a part in driving away Ma Chao. Yin Feng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
